weather: Another beautiful Grenadines day in literal paradise. Check the latest marine forecast before moving.
tonight: Mayreau — a tiny island paradise with clear water, peaceful anchorages, beach walks, and wide-open views across the Tobago Cays.
activities: Second day at Mayreau: snorkeling, fishing, catching grouper, relaxing in the anchorage, and enjoying one of the prettiest places in the Grenadines.
captainMessage: We are on our second day in Mayreau, and it is a literal paradise. Crew morale is mixed, but the adults are absolutely loving life. The captain is fully in his element: catching grouper, snorkeling, enjoying the water, and soaking up everything Mayreau has to offer.
funnyNote: Adult morale is excellent. Youth reviews are mixed. Captain Ross is in full island mode and may need to be lured back aboard with snacks.
locationNote: Manual crew update active for this trip. Current Mayreau position remains 12°38.842N 061°23.446W.
note: Updated from the crew dashboard. Manual daily family updates are active for this trip.
